snapshots.description: Desktop navbar strip — logo, catalog/checkout/profile links localized per market language. regionRef anchors on navLogo (the only web-stable navbar key in the locator file); pixelmatch falls back to fullPage when the region is unavailable, so the captured PNG still covers the entire navbar visually even though the contract names a logo anchor. Bucketed per (market, language) for 5 buckets: US/en, MX/es, CH/de, CH/fr, JP/ja.

Mobile navigation menu in its opened state. On web-responsive the hamburger drawer is open with catalog/checkout/profile/logout entries; on native (android/ios) the bottom-nav strip is always visible and we capture that strip. regionRef anchors on mobileMenuButton (web key) — falls back to fullPage on native so the bottom strip is captured anyway. Bucketed per (market, language) for 5 buckets.

Header language switcher panel after switching the locale on CH. The catalog screen has re-rendered with the new translations, and the active language button reflects the new selection. regionRef anchors on languageDEButton (present on both web and mobile). CH-only by design — the only market with a runtime DE/FR picker — bucketed per (market='CH', language=target) for 2 buckets: CH/de, CH/fr.
